name: granola-mcp
description: Access your Granola meeting notes, transcripts, and analytics directly from Claude
long_description: Connects to your local Granola installation to list and retrieve meeting notes and transcripts. Supports date filtering, multiple content formats, and file export with YAML frontmatter. All authentication is handled locally via your existing Granola login.

tools.name: list-notes
tools.description: List Granola meeting notes with optional date filtering

tools.name: list-transcripts
tools.description: List meetings that have transcripts, with optional date filtering

tools.name: get-note
tools.description: Get the full content of a specific Granola note by ID

tools.name: get-transcript
tools.description: Get the full transcript of a specific Granola meeting by document ID
